title: heterotheca correllii
intro: Heterotheca correllii, also known as Greenthread, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Heterotheca correllii include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and support the immune system. Heterotheca correllii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
